continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends late post-Endor/post-NJO era covering Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Crucible-style late Big Three transition. Excludes the far-future Legacy comics except as future guards.

content.fact: Coruscant remains the symbolic political and Jedi-pressure center during many late Legends crises.
content.injection: Use Coruscant as a capital-pressure location where Jedi, GA law, media, and Sith infiltration can collide. Do not import later-era status, relationships, factions, or outcomes into this window.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Late post-Endor Legends.
Keep retrieval topic/entity-gated; this wide-context card should not flood unrelated scenes.

content.fact: Corellia is a major flashpoint for secession, Centerpoint legacy, and Solo-family political tension during LOTF.
content.injection: When Corellia is involved in LOTF, foreground local autonomy, old superweapon stakes, and Han’s personal tie. Do not import later-era status, relationships, factions, or outcomes into this window.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Legacy of the Force / Caedus War.

content.fact: Kesh is the isolated homeworld base of the Lost Tribe of the Sith before its re-entry into galactic affairs.
content.injection: Before the Lost Tribe emerges, Kesh should not be common galactic knowledge; after emergence, it anchors Lost Tribe culture.
